startup.startingBody: Preparing the local speech backend on port {{port}}. First launch can take several minutes while the private Python runtime is installed.
startup.errorBody: Voice Diary could not prepare the local speech backend. Close the app and start it again; if it repeats, inspect the error below.

currentSession.title: Current session
currentSession.emptySub: Press "Start recording" to begin a session
currentSession.errorMicBusy: Microphone is in use by another application.
currentSession.errorBrowserUnsupported: This browser does not support microphone access.
currentSession.captureSystemHint: Records both the mic and the system output. Headphones recommended to avoid the mic re-capturing speaker output.

contacts.voiceprintUnavailable: Voiceprint not yet computed — needs at least two enrolled voice profiles to measure consistency

search.placeholder: Search… or "phrase" or AND / OR / NOT

settings.title: Settings
settings.unloadAfterStopDesc: Frees RAM, but the next recording starts with a 3–10 s delay
settings.preloadOnStartDesc: Loads ML models in the background so they are ready before your first recording.
settings.blocklistEnabledDesc: Drops transcripts matching known hallucination patterns (YouTube sign-offs, subtitle boilerplate, phantom music captions).
settings.thresholdDesc: Below 0.45 the app starts auto-identifying aggressively and false matches rise. Above 0.70 many real speakers stay in the unknown queue.
settings.thresholdHint: Threshold is read from the backend and saved immediately on change
settings.backupOnCloseDesc: Copies .db to backups/ with a timestamp
settings.storageHint: Path is read from backend configuration. Edit ~/.voice-diary/config.json to relocate.
settings.elevenlabsTokenDesc: Required for Scribe cloud transcription. Get your token at elevenlabs.io → Settings → API Keys.
settings.vadOnsetDesc: Probability must reach this value for speech to begin. Lower = more sensitive to quiet speech, but more false starts on noise. Recommended: 0.50–0.70.
settings.vadOffsetDesc: Once speaking, speech continues until probability drops below this lower threshold. The gap between onset and offset is the hysteresis band — it prevents mid-word toggling. Must be below onset. Recommended: onset − 0.15.
settings.vadMinSilenceDesc: Silence required to close an utterance. Lower = tighter sentence boundaries, better diarization. Higher = fewer, longer utterances. Recommended: 250–400 ms.
settings.vadPadPreDesc: Audio before detected speech to include for Whisper context. Captures co-articulation for the first phoneme. Recommended: 200–400 ms.
settings.vadPadPostDesc: Audio after detected speech to include for Whisper context. Recommended: 300–500 ms.
settings.vadMinUttDesc: Utterances shorter than this positive integer threshold are discarded before transcription. Default: 100 ms.
settings.vadMaxUttDesc: Force-split monologues at this length to bound memory and ASR latency. Shorter = better diarization accuracy. Recommended: 8,000–13,000 ms.
settings.vadRequiresRestart: VAD parameters take effect on the next recording. No restart required.
settings.asrNoSpeechDesc: Whisper's no_speech_prob above this value discards the output as silence. Lower = more aggressive filtering of quiet/non-speech audio. Recommended: 0.6.
settings.asrCompressionDesc: Segments with compression_ratio above this are discarded as repetitive/hallucination output. Lower = stricter filtering. Recommended: 2.4.
settings.asrRepPenaltyDesc: Penalizes token repetition during decoding. 1.0 = no penalty; higher values discourage repeats. Recommended: 1.1.
settings.asrNgramDesc: Hard-blocks any n-word phrase from appearing twice in the same output. 0 = disabled. Recommended: 3.
settings.asrParamsHint: ASR quality gates take effect on the next utterance. No restart required.
settings.itnEnabledDesc: Rewrites mapped Ukrainian or code-mixed transliterations into the configured display form, such as апі → api.
settings.itnMapsDesc: Choose which valid JSON transliteration maps are loaded from the backend ITN directory.
settings.itnMapsHint: ITN map changes take effect on the next utterance. Invalid files are shown but cannot be selected.
settings.micSelfContactDesc: Select a contact to represent yourself on the microphone. When set, mic audio skips diarization and is directly attributed to this contact. Embedding still runs to build your voice profile. Clear the selection to re-enable full diarization for mic audio.
settings.draftEnabledDesc: When enabled, a lightweight ASR model periodically transcribes mid-speech audio and shows gray interim text. Drafts are never persisted to the database.
settings.speakerHint: Speaker attribution takes effect on the next utterance. No restart required.
settings.langAllowlistEnabledDesc: Restrict transcription to allowed languages only. If the detected language is not in the allowlist, or confidence is below the threshold, the coordinator re-transcribes with every allowed language and picks the best result.
settings.langAllowlistDesc: Languages Whisper is allowed to transcribe. Any detected language outside this list triggers a retry with each allowed language. Use ISO 639-1 codes.
settings.langConfidenceThresholdDesc: If Whisper's language detection confidence is below this value, retranscribe with every allowed language and pick the highest-confidence result. Set lower to avoid unnecessary retries.
settings.langAllowlistHint: Language filtering takes effect on the next utterance. No restart required.

api.backendUnavailable: Backend not responding. Check that the server is running on 127.0.0.1:8765.
api.wsUnavailable: Could not connect to the audio WebSocket. Check that the backend is running.
api.connectFailed: Could not connect to the API.
